feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Negative Deduction config changes not impacting on existing Quota record
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help!!!

My business requirement it to change Negative deduction field of Annual Quota to -10 days from V_T559L so that Employee can apply for leaves till negative quota balance -10 days. 
I did the change to Neg Ded to field in V_T559L to -10 days effective from 01.06.2024, by delimiting the previous record.

While testing the scenarios I noticed that - 

1. For new hires/next year, it is working fine. I can see -10 days negative deduction in IT2006.

2. For existing employees (for which Annual quota record was already available with previous config of 0 negative deduction in this year 2024), negative deduction -10 days is NOT coming in existing record.

I cannot delete IT2006 annual quota record of all employees as leaves are already taken in this year. Also, cannot change quota end date as system is not allowing.

Could you please help me to solve this? Business wants this new change to be replicated from 01.06.2024 only.

Thank you.

Pratik

entry.title: Table Header Cell coloring in sap.ui.table
entry.content:
Hello All

Our UI5 version is 1.71.55

The requirement is to color the cell of headers. We have multi headers (2 headers). For 1st level header, need to color the cell with different colors. Tried with different options and still color is not reflecting. 

Gave class name directly in Label; but only Label background changes but not the complete cell.

Tried with Vertical Layout option; but again it's full-cell coloring didn't work; also second level header was missing.

Any ideas?

<tab:Column id="id_colexMatCompType" filterProperty="exMatCompType" width="7rem"
                                            headerSpan="5">
                                            <tab:multiLabels>
                                                <Label id="_IDexMatCompType1"
                                                    text="Exact Composition based on starting materials"
                                                    textAlign="Center" width="100%" class="tableHeaderWrap" />
                                                <Label id="id_labelexMatCompType"
                                                    text="{/#composition/exMatCompType/@sap:label}"
                                                    tooltip="{/#composition/exMatCompType/@sap:label}" />
                                            </tab:multiLabels>

entry.title: Can CPI return the response in.txt format?
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement that when we call the CPI URL, the API should return the response in .txt file format.

is it possible or not?

entry.title: how do i change a login email
entry.content: at accounts.sap.com

entry.title: Material ID transactional history ByD
entry.content: HI, I am looking for a standard report in ByD to show me the transactional history of a material ID between given dates, many thanks Julian

entry.title: Difference between Investment Mangement (IM) and Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (EPPM)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you help me to understand the difference between Investment Mangement (IM) and Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management (EPPM). In hierarchy wise both have same kind of structure i.e. IM- Program type, Structure, Planning etc. Same way EPPM also have Portfolio, Portfolio structure, Planning so on.

Please help me on Pros and Cons of both of this module. Can i choose EPPM instead of IM? or my thinking is not valid. Please give some light on this

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Please help to upvote this SAC idea request
entry.content:
Hello! Are you a user of SAP Analytics Cloud? Would you like to have the option to display currency signs and scales in SAP SAC charts (such as Bar Chart, Pie Chart – %, Values, and Signs)? 

There is a post on the customer influence page requesting this functionality from SAP Analytics Cloud development: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/232065 

The idea is being considered, but does not have enough votes to make it a priority (yet). Please consider this idea, and if it would be beneficial to your SAC practice, please vote it up!! Let's make those SAC reports look even better! Thanks!

entry.title: How could i see My Feed? There is an option in previous SDN that i am able to see my sucbcribed item
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Previously in one place called my feed i am able to see all the subscriptions i have. If i subscribe to two technologies and i would get the all those posts related. Its easy for me to focus on my interest area. How could such a nice feature be disabled.

entry.title: 1H2024 Preview vs Prod New Release Universal Changes - Unilateral Application of Changes/Features
entry.content:
Hello all. 

While performing initial validation of the Production 1H2024 New Release this morning, a discussion was initiated regarding how certain previously relayed changes have been adjusted without being disclosed in full and regression test allowances made to timelines for impact analysis. 

There were several major feature changes, including permissions and universally applied functionality, which were repealed or adjusted in some fashion in comparison to what was provided in the New Release What's New Viewer following Prev implementation. Not in relation to known issues, but rather, at the behest of customers due to failure to consider impact to customers for universally leveraged changes without the opportunity for change mgmt with sys users. 

We now have only 3 weeks to do complete E2E testing in all mods with various scenarios. This is running concurrently to business process owner exposure and experience sessions to provide insight into election options and new release mandatory feature impact/consideration for the processes they support. 

How are we able to successfully regression test whatever has been changed before application in Prod? Is there a full list of all changes released by a certain date to all customers, or are changes being leveraged up and until Prod implementation? I am aware of patches and known issues, but these changes are to areas that were previously configured as universally mandated or their type was noted as Automatically Applied/Need to Enable. Now their status/type has changed and requires supplemental review and potential application.

The New Org Chart, for instance. It was not enabled in our Prod instance, while the New People Profile was. The best practice recommendation from SF was to enable or disable these two universally applied features in tandem. Yet, they deviated from their own best practice when implementing the Prod New Release. This is a poor practice for updates. This is only one situation encountered this morning, and I'm sure that the E2E post-Prod validation done by our HR customers in various modules will render significantly different results than previously encountered in Prev. This also inhibits successful contingency planning and upends previously communicated business process updates and user expectations. There is also the consideration of change requirement approval/awareness for highly regulated IT systems groups.

This change management approach really needs to be addressed. And soon. We will have customer system confidence impacts due to lack of conveyance, transparency, and cohesive actions at several levels. Any insight into planned improvements and recognition of this issue would be greatly appreciated so we're able to communicate this to our customers. 

Thanks.

entry.title: If the CDS views are not released then what is the procedure to use them to create reports?
entry.content:
We are trying to create a report in SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud using standard CDS views.

For fetching data we want to use the below CDS views - 

1) ESH_N_ACCT_DOC_LINEITEM_BSEG_H

But these are not yet released and we cannot create the report. Please suggest a solution.

entry.title: SM49 or SM69 Special Character
entry.content:
I'm trying to use an OS command in SM49, so please let me know how to use it if it includes special characters.

ex) ps -ef |grep sap
In this case, " | "  is not recognized.

How do I use " |grep "  ??

entry.title: I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" in Fiori APP.
entry.content:
I wanted to add a custom field in "Manage Sales Contract Version 2" in Fiori Launchpad.

In "Custom Fileds" under This Custom Field  in the "UIs and Reports" Tab I see a lot of apps where I can enable this it for example:

- Manage Sales Order 

- Manage Sales Order V2

- Manage Sales Contract 

But it does not show "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" 

how can I solve this issue as I want want to enable it in "Manage Sales Contracts Version 2" App?

entry.title: RCM - Can we Rating scale to LVL1, LVL2...etc
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can we change the rating scale values like LvL1 , LVL2...inspite of standard rating scale

Please do confirm

Thanks

entry.title: Influence: Please vote to restore pre-1H 2024 Secondary Button color in Horizon Theme
entry.content: The 1H 2024 release changed the color of Secondary Buttons in the Horizon Theme from gray to blue and white, which is a step backwards in terms of having a professional-looking, company-branded interface. See examples below and please vote for my related suggestion in Influence Center to revert these to gray, which also matches what the preview still shows in Theme Manager.

entry.title: Can I use triggers in SAP B1 to monitor inserts?
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am working on a project where we need to monitor new entries in the OPDN table (Goods Receipt PO) in SAP Business One. Our goal is to detect when a new entry is inserted and then send the DocEntry to a specified URL for notification purposes.

My main concern is whether implementing such a trigger and stored procedure could affect the stability, performance or compatibility of SAP B1. We do not modify any data, we only monitor the insertions and send a notification.

Andersson U.

entry.title: How to use Reference material for Automatic packing, What are the config steps and Master data setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

 My client want to use the reference material functionality for automatic packing. Appreciate, if you can provide the inputs on the config and master data setup.

entry.title: Issue with Updating Records in MS Dynamics CRM via SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
I am currently utilizing the MS Dynamics CRM adapter included with the SAP Integration Suite provided by Rojo Consulting. The scenario involves extracting account credit data from the SAP system and transmitting it to the MS Dynamics CRM di_creditlimit entity. This process should either create new records or update existing records based on primary key fields (di_limitype and di_customernumber).

 

While I have successfully managed to create records in Dynamics, I am encountering an issue with updating records. Specifically, when the primary keys already exist in the system, any changes to other fields are not being updated as expected.

entry.title: Half/full pallet order quantity prerequisite for sales order creation
entry.content:
i, our client wants to have prerequisite at the time of sales order creation where certain customers are allowed to create sales orders with order quantity in multiple of half/full pallets only. This check should be active only for certain customer and not all customers. 

Ex - Product XYZ has base unit of PC and sales unit of PAL where 1 PAL = 24 PC.

If a customer sends in an EDI order for 15 PC, the EDI message should error out and a failure notification should be sent to a business user whereas, if the same customer sends in an EDI order for 48 PC, system should allow sales order creation as 48 is a multiple of 24 (2 x 24 = 48). 

 

Is there a solution available in SAP S4 Public Cloud to fulfil this requirement?

entry.title: Feature Request: Allow descriptions for global Process Intelligence filters
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to address the following feature request:

As an Analyst I would like to add a description to my global filters within my SAP Signavio Process Intelligence dashboard, so that I can provide the Consumers more easily with the information as of why certain default filters have been set in a certain way and how they can be adapted to achieve other analysis results.

BR, Anna

entry.title: Issue Updating Records in MS Dynamics CRM through SAP Integration Suite using ROJO Dynamics adapter.
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

We are currently utilizing the MS Dynamics CRM adapter included with the SAP Integration Suite provided by Rojo Consulting. The scenario involves extracting account credit data from the SAP system and transmitting it to the MS Dynamics CRM creditlimit entity. This process should either create new records or update existing records based on primary key fields (limitype and customernumber).

While we have successfully managed to create records in Dynamics,  we are encountering an issue with updating records. Specifically, when the primary keys already exist in the system, any changes to other fields are not being updated as expected.

Steps Taken:

Developed an iFlow for data transmission.

Configured a message mapping to transform data and handle lookup fields.

Verified that all fields are correctly mapped and identified in the Dynamics system.

Issue:

Records are created successfully when the primary keys do not exist.

Updates are not performed when the primary keys already exist in the system, even if other field values have changed.

Error Message :

A record that has the attribute values Customer Number, Limit Type already exists. The entity key Credit Limit Key requires that this set of attributes contains unique values. Select unique values and try again.

Has anyone experienced similar issues with updates not being performed in MS Dynamics CRM using SAP Integration Suite? What steps can we take to ensure that updates are processed correctly?
